title: TRANS LIFELINE - 211info
text: TRANS LIFELINE TRANS LIFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a volunteer-run hotline that offers crisis support and connection to resources where possible such as passport and state identification help to reflect gender identity. While the goal is to prevent self-harm, it is also a warmline where people can call with a variety of needs (i.e., how to access transition-related health care, where to find local support groups). The hotline is staffed by trans-identifying individuals. Operators will only call emergency services with the caller's consent. 548 Market Street Pmb 15337 San Francisco, CA 941045401 Eligibility: Any trans-identifying person and anyone who may be questioning their gender identity Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-6pm; closed some holidays Email (877) 565-8860 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (877) 565-8860 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or text. See website for more information or to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: General Crisis Intervention Hotlines * Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Helplines * Transgender Individuals Specialized Information and Referral * Transgender Individuals Suicide Prevention Hotlines * Transgender Individuals If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TRANS LIFELINE
